message:
fix(mux-client): switch pane delta channel to reserve-commit pattern for send correctness

Replace try_send(delta) with try_reserve() + permit.send(delta) in
pane_delta_try_send to prevent a subtle race condition where the value
is moved into try_send but the send can still fail, losing the delta.

The try_reserve pattern first obtains a channel slot guarantee via
permit, then permit.send() is infallible — ensuring the delta is either
sent or the caller gets a clean false return without data loss.

Add three targeted tests covering all code paths:
- pane_delta_try_send_delivers_via_reserve_commit: verifies successful
  delivery through the new reserve-commit pattern
- pane_delta_try_send_returns_false_when_full: verifies graceful false
  return when channel capacity is exhausted
- pane_delta_try_send_returns_false_when_receiver_closed: verifies
  graceful false return when the receiver has been dropped

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
